original_claim: All 15 shared blank channels trace to a human-sweat high-power measurement.
corrected_finding: Ten channels exactly match columns stored in two Test HS high-power master exports and five match columns stored in one Test 4-ATP high-power master export; storage context is not proof of sample identity, all 15 are reused across eight record groups, and none is a confirmed setting-matched low-power blank for the final calibration.
affected_scope: 120 exact raw copies across eight record groups; 692 legacy manifest-note rows corrected to neutral wording

original_claim: AABC material identity and analyte-free status were unresolved, so the 24 September high-power candidate was provisional.
corrected_finding: The author confirms AABC is AAB/AuAgBC and Blanck_AABC_750_5_5_H.csv is an AuAgBC substrate without 4-ATP; its date and settings match the high-power optimisation only.
affected_scope: Optimisation 750_5_5_H; unchanged source distributed under data/raw; not applicable to low- or medium-power experiments

original_claim: The prepared Blind snapshot was treated as though its release choice depended on the missing 10 September coded-sample key.
corrected_finding: The author selects the current 24 September concentration-labelled snapshot; all 135 nonblank columns have agreeing same-date and same-setting concentration-labelled master matches. The historical coded experiment remains unselected.
affected_scope: Blind release scope only; the 10 September decoding key remains necessary for that historical experiment or blinded-validation lineage
